title: GitHub Pages personal blog
exerpt: Experimenting with using AngularJS for a blog-like personal site.

title: Internship with AI start up: Tactile paving defect detection
exerpt: Solo project using Albumentations, OpenCV and Tensorflow to collect data and train a model.
content:
Worked on a joint project with LTA analysing and identifying defects in tactile paving tiles in Singapore.
		- Organised and edited code using Jupyter Notebooks.
		- Used albumentations and imgaug python libraries to augment image data, experimented with computer vision and data labeling.
		- Dealed with CSV files extensively, used python to parse and extract data from labels.
		- Used Tensorflow to train models for defect detection, experimented with both DenseNet and RCNN.

title: Attendance taking app for schools
exerpt: A simple web app to experiment with Flask WTForms and SQLAlchemy.
